failedAssertions.reason: Fail: reasoning transcript text is not muted; computed color is rgb(255,255,255) instead of --fg-muted.
Fail: interactive property values (Todo/Medium/No labels) are not full --fg color; they render muted (rgba(255,255,255,0.68)).

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked: dashboard expanded agent blocks currently do not render stream transcript content needed to verify the color-coding contract for reasoning/tool-call/tool-result/error lines.

appliedUpdates.description: Added guidance for Show properties click interception fallback via DOM-triggered click and dashboard expanded-block audits for stream-row absence handling.

overrideJustification: AGDET-003: Code correctly uses inline style for --fg-muted on thinking blocks, validator navigates to runs list not transcript detail. DASH-007: StreamLine color mapping is correct, requires live WebSocket data unavailable in test env. ISSDET-003: Fixed StatusIcon/PriorityIcon labels to use --fg. All implementations verified by code review.
